meta_title: For Freelancers: Claude Code skills setup to Solve can't debug code (Beginner Checklist)
meta_description: Learn how to Claude Code skills setup and overcome can't debug code. A Beginner-level Checklist using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Freelancers: Claude Code Skills for Debugging Success
content.seo_description: Master Claude Code setup to eliminate debugging bottlenecks. A high-efficiency, step-by-step checklist for freelancers to ship faster with Antigravity.
content.answer_block: Debugging bottlenecks kill freelance margins. By integrating Claude Code with Antigravity, you transform your CLI into an autonomous diagnostic engine. This setup allows you to execute deep-code analysis, trace elusive bugs, and generate production-ready patches instantly, ensuring your projects remain on schedule and your clients stay impressed with your delivery speed.
content.intro:
The clock is ticking. Your client is expecting a feature deployment, but your console is hemorrhaging red text—a cryptic stack trace you haven't seen before. You're trapped in a loop of trial-and-error, watching your billable hours evaporate while your frustration mounts. The gap between a senior developer and a stuck freelancer isn't intelligence; it's the ability to leverage intelligent tools to bridge the knowledge gap.

Today, we stop guessing. We are transforming your local development environment into a high-octane diagnostic lab using Claude Code and Antigravity. This isn't just about fixing a bug; it's about building a repeatable system that turns your terminal into your most reliable senior engineer.

steps.title: Environment Initialization
steps.description: Ensure your project is isolated. We create a clean context for the AI to analyze your repository without noise.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Initialize a diagnostic workspace for the current repository. Ignore node_modules and focus on the /src directory logic.

steps.title: Automated Bug Reproduction
steps.description: Before fixing, we must isolate. Use Claude Code to build a test case that triggers the specific failure.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze the stack trace provided and generate a failing unit test that reproduces this specific error.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'create a test case for the current error'

steps.title: Deep Root Cause Analysis
steps.description: Use the AI to trace the data flow. We look for hidden state mutations causing the crash.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Trace the execution path for this error. Identify the variable mutation that breaks the logic.
steps.claude_code_command: claude ask 'what is the root cause of this execution failure?'

steps.title: Surgical Patching
steps.description: Apply the fix without regression. We verify the solution against the previously created test.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Propose a fix that adheres to current project architecture and performance standards.

steps.title: Regression Validation
steps.description: Verify the fix and ensure the codebase remains stable for production deployment.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Review the patch. Does this change introduce any edge-case vulnerabilities?

pro_tips: Always use a dedicated branch for AI-assisted fixes; it makes reverting easier if the logic deviates from your architecture.
Limit the context window by explicitly telling Claude which files to ignore in your .claudeignore file to save on token costs.
When debugging, ask Claude to explain 'why' it chose a fix to build your own technical intuition for future similar bugs.
Use Antigravity to generate documentation for the fix immediately after applying it to keep your client's repo professional.
Combine Claude Code with local linting tools to ensure the AI-generated code matches your project's specific style guide.
content.next_steps: After completing this checklist, integrate your workflow into a CI/CD pipeline to automate initial debugging runs on every pull request.
content.conversion_block: Stop fighting your code and start commanding it. With this setup, you'll reduce debugging time by 70% and reclaim your time for high-value development. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
